title: Transfecting COS-1 cells using FuGENE® 4K Transfection Reagent and cell lysis (M-PER) in a 6-well plate
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ep2ks","text":"General protocol for transfecting COS-1 cells with FuGene.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"59d63","text":"6-well plate (Corning, #3506)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1lelk","text":"FuGene 4K Transfection Reagent (Promega, #E5911)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5sjlq","text":"Opti-MEM Reduced Serum Medium (Thermo Fisher Scientific, #31985062)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"905mh","text":"Plasmid constructs","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"odrq","text":"Dulbecco’s Modified Eagle Medium (DMEM) with GlutaMax (Thermo Fisher Scientific, #10569010)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6cjce","text":"FBS (Gibco, #26140-079)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"11b5o","text":"Penicillin-streptomycin (Thermo Fisher Scientific, #15140122)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fd5vl","text":"PBS, pH 7.4 (Thermo Fisher Scientific, #10010023)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3k19e","text":"M-PER mammalian protein extraction reagent (Thermo Fisher Scientific, #78501)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"39s1h","text":"Halt Protease Inhibitor Cocktail (Thermo Fisher Scientific, #78429)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Aspirate the media from all wells.
Wash each well 3 times with 2 mL ice cold 1X PBS (filtered).

Add M-PER with 1X protease and phosphatase inhibitor to each well ( see specific protocols for volume) Be sure to keep M-PER and samples on ice. Note: HALT protease and phosphatase inhibitor must be diluted in lysis buffer immediately before use (cannot be prepared the day prior).

Scrape the cells from each well 1 at a time using a cell scraper. Pipette all of the M-PER containing the cell lysate from each well into a clean 1.5 mL micro-centrifuge tube and immediately place the tubes on ice.
Centrifuge the tubes for 00:10:00 at 4 °C at 10000 rcf, , .

Collect 100 µL aliquots of the supernatant and store them for future use (lysate that will be used within 1-2 weeks after harvesting can be stored at -20 °C , otherwise store lysates in -80 °C , per Cell Signaling recommendations).
Incubate the plate(s) in a 37 °C incubator with 5% CO 2 according to the manufacturer's protocol.
After incubation, pipette 100 µL of the reaction mixture into the corresponding wells. Tilt the plate(s) back and forth to mix.
While incubating, the DNA with FuGene:Opti-MEM, aspirate the old media from the cells. Add 1 mL of fresh DMEM + 10% FBS + 1% pen-strep to each well.

Add plasmid constructs to each tube containing FuGene:Opti-MEM (ratio according to the manufacturer's protocol FuGENE® 4K Transfection Reagent Promega Catalog #E5911 ). Vortex briefly and incubate at room temperature for 00:15:00 .

Once cells have grown to 50-80% confluence, transfect. In a biosafety cabinet, combine FuGene and Opti-Mem (referred to in the Promega protocol as just "medium," volumes according to the manufacturer's protocol FuGENE® 4K Transfection Reagent Promega Catalog #E5911 ) in a 1.5 mL eppendorf tube. Vortex gently for 1-2 seconds and incubate at room temperature for 00:05:00 .
Seed COS-1 cells in a 6-well plate ( see specific protocols for seeding density and total volume amounts ). Incubate the plated cells in 37 °C with 5% CO2 (see specific protocols for duration).

Cos1 cell line were purchased from (ATCC # CRL-1650) and cultured in DMEM with GlutaMax DMEM with GlutaMax (Thermo Fisher Scientific, # 10569010) supplemented with 10% FBS Fetal Bovine Serum, certified # 16000044 and 1% penicillin-streptomycin (Thermo Fisher Scientific, # 15140122) .
Cells were maintained at 37 °C in 5% CO 2 and split 1:5 every 3-5 days based on the confluence (80-100 %) reached through visual monitoring. Cells were not passaged more than 30 times.
creator: Jailyn Izu
